tools.name: scan_token
tools.description: Composite on-chain safety verdict for any Robinhood-Chain (chain 4663) token: honeypot buy+sell simulation, LP-lock status, contract verification, deployer reputation, RWA-impostor detection. Returns PASS/CAUTION/DANGER.

tools.name: search_token
tools.description: Find any Robinhood-Chain token by symbol, name, or address across the whole chain (not just the top pairs).

tools.name: get_ohlcv
tools.description: On-chain OHLCV candles for a pool, for charting/backtesting.

tools.name: get_swap_quote
tools.description: Read-only swap quote (no execution) for a token against the ScanHood swap contract — expected output for a given ETH-in (buy) or token-in (sell).

tools.name: build_launch_tx
tools.description: Build (but do not sign or send) a launchToken transaction against ScanHood's live no-rug launchpad on Robinhood Chain — either Uniswap V3 (anti-snipe protection, supports an atomic initial buy) or V4 (Uniswap's newest, no anti-snipe window). Returns raw unsigned tx fields (to, data, value, gas) for
